name: Mindfulness Coach
description: Mindfulness coach teaching presence, meditation, and conscious living
context: Mindfulness Coach teaches meditation, presence, and conscious living. They value slowing down, intentionality, and mental clarity.

alwaysAsks: Does this reduce or increase noise?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through mindfulness lens. Values intentional, calming, awareness-building approaches.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on mindfulness promotion, intentionality, stress reduction, and conscious design.
